limitations: Exact chat message timestamps were not recoverable from local repo truth.
Operator feedback entries are reconstructed from the surviving thread and anchored between exact version events.

exactAnchors.message: player 0.6.8: make fresh images pause and videos play

entries.speaker: assistant
entries.message: Published 0.6.8 to make fresh image loads pause and fresh video loads play, with the packaged prerelease artifact deployed as FrameAngel.DevPlayer.8.var.

entries.speaker: operator
entries.message: Okay.. good. Issue is solved. Playback overall feels better. Seems like some media gets out of sync easier than others. But overall.. no bugs.

entries.speaker: operator
entries.message: Asked how often audio and video were being synced, which identified that the player was monitoring state every frame but not doing periodic hard correction.

decisions: Treat 0.6.8 as the first good post-autoplay-fix baseline.
Move the next slice toward periodic sync correction because some media still drifted.
openQuestions: What cadence and guardrails should periodic sync use without hurting playback?
notes: This retroactive log preserves the operator outcome and the next seam decision, but not exact per-message times.
